'''rarushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocardia|nocardia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-r-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocardia|nocardia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| rarushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rærishith|rærishith]] || [[word:rærishij|rærishij]] || [[word:rærishish|rærishish]] || [[word:rærishi|rærishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rarurushuth|rarurushuth]] || [[word:rarurushuj|rarurushuj]] || [[word:rarurushush|rarurushush]] || [[word:rarurushu|rarurushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rarushuth|rarushuth]] || [[word:rarushuj|rarushuj]] || [[word:rarushush|rarushush]] || [[word:rarushu|rarushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rarufshuth|rarufshuth]] || [[word:rarufshuj|rarufshuj]] || [[word:rarufshush|rarufshush]] || [[word:rarufshuf|rarufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rarushuthu|rarushuthu]] || [[word:rarushuju|rarushuju]] || [[word:rarushushu|rarushushu]] || [[word:rarushuku|rarushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rarushuth|rarushuth]] || [[word:rarushuj|rarushuj]] || [[word:rarushush|rarushush]] || [[word:rarushu|rarushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rarushuthul|rarushuthul]] || [[word:rarushujul|rarushujul]] || [[word:rarushushul|rarushushul]] || [[word:rarushukul|rarushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rarushuthuthu|rarushuthuthu]] || [[word:rarushujuju|rarushujuju]] || [[word:rarushushushu|rarushushushu]] || [[word:rarushuku|rarushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rarushuthun|rarushuthun]] || [[word:rarushujun|rarushujun]] || [[word:rarushushun|rarushushun]] || [[word:rarushukun|rarushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rarushuthuoro|rarushuthuoro]] || [[word:rarushujuoro|rarushujuoro]] || [[word:rarushushuoro|rarushushuoro]] || [[word:rarushukuoro|rarushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
